scope: governance audit skill trial compact evidence_plan alias normalization
summary: DeepSeek confirmed normalizeEvidencePlan only maps common compact-output aliases to canonical schema fields, does not weaken src/workflow/audit-skill-trial-run.js validation, and does not change final_verdict closeout blocking logic.
non_blocking_notes: Default fallback evidence_plan values only apply when both canonical and alias keys are absent; DeepSeek judged this safe because final_verdict still controls closeout blocking.
